description_long: This object consists of two halves of a kiwi fruit, each displaying a rough, brown, fibrous outer skin and a vibrant green interior. The cut surfaces reveal a radial pattern of small black seeds encircling a lighter, creamy white core at the center. The skin appears slightly fuzzy and matte, while the interior is moist and glossy, with a distinct color contrast between the green flesh and the white core. The halves are irregularly shaped, with one half showing more of the interior and the other more of the exterior. The object is small and rounded, typical of a fresh kiwi fruit that has been cleanly sliced in half. The overall appearance suggests freshness and a natural, organic texture.
description: Two halves of a kiwi fruit, showing a fuzzy brown skin and a vibrant green, seed-speckled interior with a white core.
description_view_0: The left half displays the cut surface with green flesh, black seeds, and a white core, while the right half shows more of the brown, fuzzy exterior.
description_view_1: The left half is mostly the brown, textured skin, and the right half highlights the green, moist interior with seeds and core.
description_view_2: The left half is dominated by the green, seed-filled interior, and the right half is almost entirely the brown, fibrous skin.
description_view_3: The left half shows the green interior with seeds, while the right half presents the cut surface and a partial view of the skin.
attribute_feather_pattern: No feathers are present; the surface is covered with a fine, brown, fibrous skin that is slightly fuzzy. The interior is smooth and moist, with a radial pattern of black seeds embedded in bright green flesh around a white core.
attribute_beak_shape: No beak is present; the object is a sliced fruit with a rounded, oval shape and a flat cut surface.
attribute_eye_placement: No eyes are present; the object is a fruit and does not display any anatomical features such as eyes.
attribute_walking_posture: Not applicable; the object is a fruit and does not exhibit any walking posture.
